title: OJCP Verification Step
description: A discrete identity verification action required before an application can proceed.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this verification step within the application session.

verifier_id.description: Identifier of the identity verification provider (e.g., 'id.me', 'clear').

verification_url.description: URL the candidate must visit to complete verification. Agents should open this in a browser.

required.description: Whether this step must be completed before the application can proceed.

human_required.description: Whether this step requires human interaction (e.g., face scan, document upload). When true, the agent must hand off to the human.

estimated_completion_minutes.description: Estimated time in minutes for the candidate to complete this step.

instructions.description: Human-readable instructions for the agent to relay to the candidate.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this verification step's URL expires.

proof_delivery.description: How the verification proof is delivered after the candidate completes verification. 'provider_managed': the provider collects the proof directly from the verifier via server callback or embedded iframe — the agent does not need to submit proofs. 'agent_submitted': the agent must collect the proof and include it in submit_application. Defaults to 'agent_submitted' if omitted.
